defaultdict, deque\n\nbase = Path('/app')\n\ndef parse_day_from_name(name):\n    m = re.search(r'day_(\\\\d+)_', name)\n    if not m:\n        raise ValueError(name)\n    return int(m.group(1))\n\ndef parse_id_from_name(name, prefix):\n    m = re.search(fr'_{prefix}_(\\\\d+)', name)\n    if not m:\n        raise ValueError(name)\n    return f'{prefix}_{int(m.group(1))}'\n\n# Parse supplier receipts\nsupplier = []\nfor path in sorted((base/'raw_supplier_receipts').iterdir()):\n    day = parse_day_from_name(path.name)\n    producer = re.search(r'PR_\\\\d+', path.name).group(0)\n    if path.suffix == '.json':\n        data = json.loads(path.read_text())\n        for item in data['items']:\n            supplier.append((day, producer, item['prod_id'], int(item['delivered_qty'])))\n    elif path.suffix == '.csv':\n        with path.open() as f:\n            reader = csv.DictReader(f, delimiter=';')\n            for row in reader:\n                supplier.append((day, producer, row['PRODUCT'], int(row['DELIVERED_QTY'])))\n    else:\n        text = path.read_text().strip().splitlines()\n        if 'key-value' in path.name:\n            for line in text:\n                if int(m.group(2))))\n        else:\n            for line in text:\n                m = re.search(r'delivered (\\\\d+) units of product (P_\\\\d+)', line)\n                supplier.append((day, producer, sorted by supplier seq\nby_day_prod = defaultdict(list)\nfor day, pr, prod, qty in supplier:\n    by_day_prod[(day, prod)].append((sup_seq[(day, pr)], pr, qty))\nfor k in by_day_prod:\n    by_day_prod[k].sort()\n\n# Parse raw orders\norders = defaultdict(dict)\nfor path in (base/'raw_orders').iterdir():\n    day = parse_day_from_name(path.name)\n    store = re.search(r'S_\\\\d+', path.name).group(0)\n    if path.suffix == '.json':\n        data = json.loads(path.read_text())\n        for item in data['items']:\n            orders[(day, store)][item['product_id']] = int(item['quantity'])\n    elif path.suffix == '.csv':\n        with path.open() as f:\n            reader = csv.DictReader(f, delimiter=';')\n            for row in reader:\n                orders[(day, store)][row['PRODUCT']] = int(row['QUANTITY'])\n    else:\n        lines = path.read_text().strip().splitlines()\n        if 'key-value' in path.name:\n            for line in lines:\n                m = re.search(r'ORDER_PRODUCT: (P_\\\\d+) \\\\| ORDER_QTY: (\\\\d+)', line)\n                orders[(day, store)][m.group(1)] = int(m.group(2))\n        else:\n            for line in lines:\n                m = re.search(r'deliver (\\\\d+) units of product (P_\\\\d+)', line)\n                orders[(day, store)][m.group(2)] = int(m.group(1))\n\n# Parse store receipts\nstore_seq = {}\nstore_total = {}\nfor path in (base/'raw_wholesaler_store_receipts').iterdir():\n    text = path.read_text().splitlines()\n    day = int(text[0].split(':')[1].strip())\n    store = text[1].split(':')[1].strip()\n    seq = int(text[2].split(':')[1].strip())\n    total = int(text[3].split(':')[1].strip())\n    store_seq[(day, store)] = seq\n    store_total[(day, store)] = total\n\nstores = sorted({s for _,s in store_seq})\nproducts = sorted({p for _,_,p,_ in supplier}, key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n\n# Simulate wholesaler inventory if all supplier receipts first, then stores.\ninv = {p: deque() for p in products}\nmax_mismatch = []\nfor day in range(1, 366):\n    for p in products:\n        for seq, pr, qty in by_day_prod.get((day,p),[]):\n            inv[p].append([pr, qty])\n    # deliver to stores in store seq order\n    for store in sorted(stores, key=lambda s: store_seq[(day,s)]):\n        delivered_total = 0\n        for p, qty in orders.get((day, store), {}).items():\n            want = qty\n            q = inv[p]\n            while want and q:\n                take = min(want, q[0][1])\n                want -= take\n                q[0][1] -= take\n                delivered_total += take\n                if q[0][1]==0:\n                    q.popleft()\n        exp = store_total[(day, store)]\n        if delivered_total \"'!= exp:\n            max_mismatch.append((day, store, delivered_total, exp))\n            if len(max_mismatch) >= 10:\n                break\n    if len(max_mismatch) >= 10:\n        break\n\nprint('\"'mismatches', len(max_mismatch))\nprint(max_mismatch[:10])\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

q[0][1])\n                want -= take\n                q[0][1] -= take\n                delivered_total += take\n                if q[0][1]==0:\n                    q.popleft()\n        exp = lines[1].split(':')[1].strip(), int(lines[2].split(':')[1]), int(lines[3].split(':')[1])))\nstore_receipts_df = pd.DataFrame(store_rows, columns=['day','store','store_seq','total_delivered'])\n\n# Sales aggregate\nsales_df = pd.read_csv(base/'sales_log.csv')\nsales_agg = sales_df.groupby(['Day','Store_ID','Product_ID'], as_index=False)[['Reported_Demand','Sold_Quantity','Lost_Sales']].sum()\nsales_agg.columns = ['day','store','product','demand','sold','lost']\n\nproducts = sorted(supplier_df['product'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\nstores = sorted(store_receipts_df['store'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n\nsupplier_by_day_prod = defaultdict(list)\nfor row in supplier_df.sort_values(['day','product','supplier_seq','producer']).itertuples(index=False):\n    supplier_by_day_prod[(row.day,row.product)].append((int(row.supplier_seq), row.producer, int(row.qty)))\n\norders_by_day_store = defaultdict(list)\nfor row in orders_df.itertuples(index=False):\n    orders_by_day_store[(int(row.day), row.store)].append((row.product, int(row.qty)))\n\nstore_seq = {(int(r.day), r.store): int(r.store_seq) for r in store_receipts_df.itertuples(index=False)}\nstore_total = {(int(r.day), r.store): int(r.total_delivered) for r in store_receipts_df.itertuples(index=False)}\n\n# simulate wholesaler -> store deliveries with producer segments\nwh_inv = {p: deque() for p in products}\ndelivery_rows = []\ndelivery_segment_rows = []\nfor day in range(1, 366):\n    for p in products:\n        for seq, pr, qty in supplier_by_day_prod.get((day,p),[]):\n            wh_inv[p].append([pr, qty])\n    for store in sorted(stores, key=lambda s: store_seq[(day,s)]):\n        total = 0\n        for p, qty in orders_by_day_store.get((day,store), []):\n            want = qty\n            delivered = 0\n            while want and wh_inv[p]:\n                take = min(want, wh_inv[p][0][1])\n                want -= take\n                wh_inv[p][0][1] -= take\n                delivered += take\n                total += take\n                delivery_segment_rows.append((day, store, p, wh_inv[p][0][0], take))\n                if wh_inv[p][0][1] == 0:\n                    wh_inv[p].popleft()\n            if delivered:\n                delivery_rows.append((day, store, p, delivered))\n        if total \"'!= store_total[(day,store)]:\n            raise RuntimeError(('\"'delivery mismatch', day, store, total, store_total[(day,store)]))\n\ndeliveries_df = pd.DataFrame(delivery_rows, columns=['day','store','product','delivered'])\ndelivery_segments_df = pd.DataFrame(delivery_segment_rows, columns=['day','store','product','producer','qty'])\n\n# simulate store sales using previous deliveries, FIFO by producer\nstore_inv = {(s,p): deque() for s in stores for p in products}\nsold_segment_rows = []\ninv_checks = []\n# index deliveries by day/store/product\nfor day in range(1, 366):\n    # sell from inventory available at start of day (deliveries from prior days already loaded)\n    day_sales = sales_agg[sales_agg['day']==day]\n    for row in day_sales.itertuples(index=False):\n        key = (row.store, row.product)\n        q = int(row.sold)\n        avail = sum(x[1] for x in store_inv[key])\n        if q > avail:\n            inv_checks.append((day, row.store, row.product, q, avail))\n        remaining = q\n        while remaining and store_inv[key]:\n            take = min(remaining, store_inv[key][0][1])\n            remaining -= take\n            store_inv[key][0][1] -= take\n            sold_segment_rows.append((day, row.store, row.product, store_inv[key][0][0], take))\n            if store_inv[key][0][1] == 0:\n                store_inv[key].popleft()\n        if remaining:\n            raise RuntimeError(('negative inventory selling', day, row.store, row.product, q, avail))\n    # then append same-day deliveries for next day's sales\n    for row in delivery_segments_df[delivery_segments_df['day']==day].itertuples(index=False):\n        store_inv[(row.store,row.product)].append([row.producer, int(row.qty)])\n\nsold_segments_df = pd.DataFrame(sold_segment_rows, columns=['day','store','product','producer','qty'])\n\n# compute end inventory summary maybe not needed\npickle.dump({\n    'supplier_df': supplier_df,\n    'orders_df': orders_df,\n    'store_receipts_df': store_receipts_df,\n    'sales_agg': sales_agg,\n    'deliveries_df': deliveries_df,\n    'delivery_segments_df': delivery_segments_df,\n    'sold_segments_df': sold_segments_df,\n}, out.open('wb'))\nprint('cached', out)\nprint('supplier rows', len(supplier_df), 'orders rows', len(orders_df), 'deliveries', len(deliveries_df), 'delivery segments', len(delivery_segments_df), 'sold segments', len(sold_segments_df))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_27","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport pickle, pandas as pd, numpy as np\nfrom collections import defaultdict\n\ncache = pickle.load(open('/tmp/supply_cache.pkl','rb'))\nsales = cache['sales_agg']\nsold_seg = cache['sold_segments_df']\n\n# baseline estimate per product using alternating quantiles\nproducts = sorted(sales['product'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\nstores = sorted(sales['store'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\ndays = np.arange(1, 366)\nbase_rows = []\nfor p in products:\n    mat = sales[sales['product']==p].pivot(index='day', columns='store', values='demand').reindex(index=days, columns=stores).fillna(0).values.astype(float)\n    b = np.maximum(mat.mean(axis=0), 1e-6)\n    b /= b.mean()\n    c = np.maximum(mat.mean(axis=1), 1e-6)\n    for _ in range(20):\n        ratios = mat / b[None,:]\n        c = np.quantile(ratios, 0.8, axis=1)\n        c = np.maximum(c, 1e-6)\n        ratios2 = mat / c[:,None]\n        b = np.quantile(ratios2, 0.9, axis=0)\n        b = np.maximum(b, 1e-6)\n        scale = b.mean()\n        b /= scale\n        c *= scale\n    baseline = c[:,None]*b[None,:]\n    res = mat / baseline\n    for i,day in enumerate(days):\n        for j,store in enumerate(stores):\n            base_rows.append((p, day, store, baseline[i,j], res[i,j]))\nbase = pd.DataFrame(base_rows, columns=['product','day','store','baseline','ratio'])\n\nmix = sold_seg.groupby(['day','store','product','producer'], as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\ncell = mix.groupby(['day','store','product']).agg(total_qty=('qty','sum'), nprod=('producer','nunique'), producer=('producer','first')).reset_index()\nexclusive = cell[(cell['nprod']==1) & (cell['total_qty']>0)].copy()\nexclusive = exclusive.merge(base, on=['product','day','store'], how='left')\nbase_map = base.set_index(['product','day','store'])['ratio']\n\nrows=[]\nfor row in exclusive.itertuples(index=False):\n    p,day,store,qty,_,producer,baseline,ratio = row\n    prev = []\n    fut = []\n    for l in range(1,15):\n        if day-l>=1:\n            prev.append(base_map.get((p, day-l, store), np.nan))\n        if day+l<=365:\n            fut.append(base_map.get((p, day+l, store), np.nan))\n    rows.append((p, producer, day, store, qty, np.nanmean(prev), np.nanmean(fut), np.nanmean(fut[:3]) if fut else np.nan))\nevents = pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=['product','producer','day','store','qty','prev14_ratio','next14_ratio','next3_ratio'])\n# clean pre-period\nclean = events[(events['prev14_ratio']>0.92) & (events['day']<=351)]\nsummary = clean.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('day','size'), mean_next3=('next3_ratio','mean'), mean_next14=('next14_ratio','mean')).reset_index()\nsummary = summary[summary['events']>=3].sort_values(['product','mean_next3','mean_next14','events'])\nfor p in products[:10]:\n    sub = summary[summary['product']==p].head(8)\n    print('\\\\n',p)\n    print(sub.to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_28","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport pickle, pandas as pd, numpy as np\n\ncache = pickle.load(open('/tmp/supply_cache.pkl','rb'))\nsales = cache['sales_agg']\nsold_seg = cache['sold_segments_df']\n\nproducts = sorted(sales['product'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\nstores = sorted(sales['store'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\ndays = np.arange(1, 366)\nbase_rows = []\nfor p in products:\n    mat = sales[sales['product']==p].pivot(index='day', columns='store', values='demand').reindex(index=days, columns=stores).fillna(0).values.astype(float)\n    b = np.maximum(mat.mean(axis=0), 1e-6)\n    b /= b.mean()\n    c = np.maximum(mat.mean(axis=1), 1e-6)\n    for _ in range(20):\n        c = np.quantile(mat / b[None,:], 0.8, axis=1)\n        c = np.maximum(c, 1e-6)\n        b = np.quantile(mat / c[:,None], 0.9, axis=0)\n        b = np.maximum(b, 1e-6)\n        scale = b.mean()\n        b /= scale\n        c *= scale\n    baseline = c[:,None]*b[None,:]\n    res = mat / baseline\n    base_rows.extend((p, int(day), store, float(baseline[i,j]), float(res[i,j])) for i,day in enumerate(days) for j,store in enumerate(stores))\nbase = pd.DataFrame(base_rows, columns=['product','day','store','baseline','ratio'])\nbase_map = {(r.product,r.day,r.store): r.ratio for r in base.itertuples(index=False)}\n\nmix = sold_seg.groupby(['day','store','product','producer'], as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\ncell = mix.groupby(['day','store','product']).agg(total_qty=('qty','sum'), nprod=('producer','nunique')).reset_index()\nexclusive = cell[(cell['nprod']==1) & (cell['total_qty']>0)].merge(mix[['day','store','product','producer']], on=['day','store','product'], how='left').drop_duplicates()\n\nrows=[]\nfor row in exclusive.itertuples(index=False):\n    p=row.product; {"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_30","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport pickle, pandas as pd, numpy as np\nfrom sklearn.linear_model import LassoCV\n\ncache = pickle.load(open('/tmp/supply_cache.pkl','rb'))\nsales = cache['sales_agg']\nsold_seg = cache['sold_segments_df']\nproducts = sorted(sales['product'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\nstores = sorted(sales['store'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\ndays = np.arange(1,366)\n# baseline factorization data\nfactors = {}\nfor p in products:\n    mat = sales[sales['product']==p].pivot(index='day', columns='store', values='demand').reindex(index=days, columns=stores).fillna(0).values.astype(float)\n    b = np.maximum(mat.mean(axis=0),1e-6); b/=b.mean()\n    c = np.maximum(mat.mean(axis=1),1e-6)\n    for _ in range(30):\n        c = np.quantile(mat / b[None,:], 0.8, axis=1)\n        c = np.maximum(c,1e-6)\n        # simple smoothing to reduce noise but keep seasonality\n        c = pd.Series(c).rolling(7, center=True, min_periods=1).mean().values\n        b = np.quantile(mat / c[:,None], 0.9, axis=0)\n        b = np.maximum(b,1e-6)\n        scale = b.mean(); b/=scale; c*=scale\n    factors[p]=(b,c,mat)\n\nkernel = np.array([0.8]*3 + [0.5]*4 + [0.2]*7)\nfor p in products[:10]:\n    b,c,mat = factors[p]\n    q = sold_seg[sold_seg['product']==p].groupby(['day','store','producer'])['qty'].sum().unstack('producer', fill_value=0)\n    producers = sorted(q.columns, key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n    # build q tensor days x stores x producers normalized by c_day\n    q_arr = np.zeros((365, len(stores), len(producers)))\n    store_idx={s:i for i,s in enumerate(stores)}\n    prod_idx={pr:i for i,pr in enumerate(producers)}\n    for (day,store,producer), qty in q.stack().items():\n        q_arr[int(day)-1, store_idx[store], prod_idx[producer]] = qty / c[int(day)-1]\n    # convolution feature per day/store/producer using previous sales\n    X = np.zeros((365*len(stores), len(producers)))\n    for lag, w in enumerate(kernel, start=1):\n        X[lag*len(stores):] += w * q_arr[:-lag].reshape((-1, len(producers)))\n    y = np.maximum(b[None,:] - (mat / c[:,None]), 0).reshape(-1)\n    # drop day1 maybe few invalid due no lag, but keep; also drop rows with no features and zero y? maybe okay\n    model = LassoCV(cv=5, positive=True, fit_intercept=False, n_jobs=None, random_state=0, max_iter=20000).fit(X, y)\n    coef = pd.Series(model.coef_, index=producers)\n    coef = coef[coef>1e-4].sort_values(ascending=False)\n    print('\\\\n',p,'alpha',model.alpha_,'selected',len(coef))\n    print(coef.head(10).to_string())\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

 prod_idx={pr:i for i,pr in enumerate(producers)}\n    for (day,store,producer), qty in g.items():\n        q_arr[int(day)-1, store_idx[store], prod_idx[producer]] = qty / c[int(day)-1]\n    X = - (mat / c[:,None]), 0).reshape(-1)\n    model = LassoCV(cv=5, positive=True, fit_intercept=False, random_state=0, max_iter=50000).fit(X2, y)\n    coef = pd.Series(model.coef_, index=producers)\n b/=b.mean()\n    c = np.maximum(mat.mean(axis=1),1e-6)\n    for _ in range(25):\n        c = np.quantile(mat / b[None,:], 0.8, axis=1)\n        c = pd.Series(np.maximum(c,1e-6)).rolling(7, center=True, min_periods=1).mean().to_numpy()\n        b = np.quantile(mat / c[:,None], 0.9, axis=0)\n        b = np.maximum(b,1e-6)\n        scale=b.mean(); b/=scale; c*=scale\n    baseline = c[:,None]*b[None,:]\n    ratio = mat / baseline\n    for i,day in enumerate(days):\n        for j,store in enumerate(stores):\n            ratio_map[(p,int(day),store)] = float(ratio[i,j])\n\nmix = sold_seg.groupby(['day','store','product','producer'], as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\n# For each store/day/product, determine if exclusive and start of producer exposure run\ncell = mix.groupby(['day','store','product']).agg(total_qty=('qty','sum'), nprod=('producer','nunique')).reset_index()\nexclusive = cell[(cell['nprod']==1) & (cell['total_qty']>0)].merge(mix[['day','store','product','producer']], on=['day','store','product'], how='left').drop_duplicates()\n# map producer sold previous day\nmix_prev = mix.rename(columns={'day':'prev_day','qty':'prev_qty','producer':'prev_producer'})\n# simpler: set of producers sold previous day in same store/product\nprev_map = mix.groupby(['day','store','product'])['producer'].apply(set).to_dict()\nrows=[]\nfor row in exclusive.itertuples(index=False):\n    p=row.product; day=int(row.day); store=row.store; producer=row.producer; qty=int(row.total_qty)\n    prev_prods = prev_map.get((day-1, store, p), set())\n    if producer in prev_prods:\n        continue\n    pre_short=[ratio_map.get((p,d,store),np.nan) for d in range(max(1,day-3),day)]\n    pre_long=[ratio_map.get((p,d,store),np.nan) for d in range(max(1,day-14),day)]\n    post3=[ratio_map.get((p,d,store),np.nan) for d in range(day+1,min(365,day+3)+1)]\n    post14=[ratio_map.get((p,d,store),np.nan) for d in range(day+1,min(365,day+14)+1)]\n    rows.append((p,producer,day,store,qty,np.nanmean(pre_short),np.nanmean(pre_long),np.nanmean(post3),np.nanmean(post14),np.nanmean(post3)-np.nanmean(pre_short)))\nstarts = pd.DataFrame(rows, columns=['product','producer','day','store','qty','pre3','pre14','post3','post14','delta3'])\n# strong clean starts\ncand = starts[(starts['pre14']>0.95) & (starts['day']<=351)]\nsummary = cand.groupby(['product','producer']).agg(events=('day','size'), qty=('qty','mean'), mean_delta3=('delta3','mean'), worst_delta3=('delta3','min'), mean_post3=('post3','mean')).reset_index()\nsummary = summary[summary['events']>=2].sort_values(['product','mean_delta3','worst_delta3'])\nfor p in products[:10]:\n    print('\\\\n'+p)\n    print(summary[summary['product']==p].head(10).to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

b/=b.mean()\n    c = np.maximum(mat.mean(axis=1),1e-6).copy()\n    for _ in range(25):\n        c = np.quantile(mat / b[None,:], 0.8, axis=1)\n        c = pd.Series(np.maximum(c,1e-6)).rolling(7, center=True, min_periods=1).mean().to_numpy().copy()\n        b = np.quantile(mat / c[:,None], 0.9, axis=0)\n        b = np.maximum(b,1e-6).copy()\n        scale=b.mean(); day=int(row.day); store=row.store; producer=row.producer; qty=int(row.total_qty)\n    if producer in prev_map.get((day-1, store, p), set()):\n        continue\n    mat = matrices[p]\n    others=[s for s in stores if s\"'!=store]\n    ctrl=mat[others].mean(axis=1)\n    y=mat[store]\n    pre_idx=list(range(max(1,day-14), day))\n    post_idx3=list(range(day+1,min(365,day+3)+1))\n    if len(pre_idx)<7 or len(post_idx3)<3:\n        continue\n    ratios=(y.loc[pre_idx]/ctrl.loc[pre_idx].replace(0,np.nan)).dropna()\n    if len(ratios)<7:\n        continue\n    alpha=ratios.median()\n    pre_err=(y.loc[pre_idx]/(alpha*ctrl.loc[pre_idx])).replace([np.inf,-np.inf],np.nan).dropna()\n    post3=(y.loc[post_idx3]/(alpha*ctrl.loc[post_idx3])).replace([np.inf,-np.inf],np.nan).dropna()\n    rows.append((p,producer,day,store,qty,pre_err.mean(),pre_err.std(),post3.mean(),post3.min(),post3.tolist()))\nevents=pd.DataFrame(rows,columns=['\"'product','producer','day','store','qty','pre_mean','pre_std','post3_mean','post3_min','post3_list'])\n# filter some suspects\nsus=[('P_5','PR_6'),('P_8','PR_26'),('P_8','PR_8'),('P_9','PR_13'),('P_12','PR_48'),('P_12','PR_50'),('P_3','PR_50')]\nfor p,pr in sus:\n    print('\\\\n',p,pr)\n    sub=events[(events.product==p)&(events.producer==pr)].sort_values('day')\n    print(sub.to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

pre3=rel.loc[pre3_idx].to_numpy(dtype=float)\n    post14=rel.loc[post14_idx].to_numpy(dtype=float)\n    if np.isnan(pre14).any() or np.isnan(pre3).any() or np.isnan(post14).any():\n        continue\n    # clean-ish pre window\n    if not (0.97 <= pre14.mean() <= 1.03 and pre14.std() < 0.05 and 0.98 <= pre3.mean() <= 1.03):\n        continue\n    # fit single recovery shock\n    f = np.dot(k, 1-post14) / np.dot(k,k)\n    f = float(np.clip(f, 0, 1.2))\n    pred1 = 1 - f*k\n    sse0 = float(np.square(post14-1).sum())\n    sse1 = float(np.square(post14-pred1).sum())\n    improve = sse0 - sse1\n    corr = float(np.corrcoef(post14, pred1)[0,1]) if np.std(post14)>0 else 0.0\n    rows.append((p,producer,day,store,qty,pre14.mean(),pre14.std(),f,sse0,sse1,improve,corr,post14[:3].mean(),post14.mean(),post14.min()))\n\nevents=pd.DataFrame(rows,columns=['\"'product','producer','day','store','qty','pre_mean','pre_std','f','sse0','sse1','improve','corr','post3_mean','post14_mean','post14_min'])\n# filter meaningful fitted shock\ncand=events[(events['f']>=0.08) & (events['improve']>=0.01) & (events['corr']>=0.3) & (events['post3_mean']<=0.97)]\nprint('candidate events',len(cand))\nprint(cand.sort_values(['improve','f'], ascending=[False,False]).head(100).to_string(index=False))\nprint('\\\\nSummary by {"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_49","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport pickle, pandas as pd, numpy as np\nfrom scipy.optimize import nnls\n\ncache=pickle.load(open('/tmp/supply_cache.pkl','rb'))\nsales=cache['sales_agg']; sold_seg=cache['sold_segments_df']\nproducts=sorted(sales['product'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\nstores=sorted(sales['store'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\ndays=np.arange(1,366)\n# baseline factors as before\nfactors={}\nfor p in products:\n    mat=sales[sales['product']==p].pivot(index='day', columns='store', values='demand').reindex(index=days, columns=stores).fillna(0).values.astype(float)\n    b=np.maximum(mat.mean(axis=0),1e-6).copy(); b/=b.mean(); c=np.maximum(mat.mean(axis=1),1e-6).copy()\n    for _ in range(25):\n        c=np.quantile(mat / b[None,:], 0.8, axis=1)\n        c=pd.Series(np.maximum(c,1e-6)).rolling(7, center=True, min_periods=1).mean().to_numpy().copy()\n        b=np.quantile(mat / c[:,None], 0.9, axis=0); b=np.maximum(b,1e-6).copy(); scale=b.mean(); b/=scale; c*=scale\n    factors[p]=(b,c,mat)\n\nkernel=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\n# compute stepwise ranks all products\nstep_info=[]\nfor p in products:\n    b,c,mat=factors[p]\n    g=sold_seg[sold_seg['product']==p].groupby(['day','store','producer'])['qty'].sum()\n    producers=sorted(g.index.get_level_values('producer').unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n    q_arr=np.zeros((365,len(stores),len(producers)))\n    store_idx={s:i for i,s in enumerate(stores)}; prod_idx={pr:i for i,pr in enumerate(producers)}\n    for (day,store,producer), qty in g.items():\n        q_arr[int(day)-1, store_idx[store], prod_idx[producer]] = qty / c[int(day)-1]\n    X=np.zeros((365,len(stores),len(producers)))\n    for lag,w in enumerate(kernel, start=1):\n        X[lag:] += w*q_arr[:-lag]\n    X2=X.reshape((-1,len(producers)))\n    y=np.maximum(b[None,:] - (mat / c[:,None]),0).reshape(-1)\n    selected=[]; rem=list(range(len(producers))); cur_sse=(y*y).sum();\n    for rank in range(1,8):\n        best=None\n        for j in rem:\n            cols=selected+[j]\n            coef,_=nnls(X2[:,cols],y)\n            pred=X2[:,cols]@coef\n            sse=((y-pred)**2).sum()\n            bic=len(y)*np.log(sse/len(y)+1e-12)+len(cols)*np.log(len(y))\n            if best is None or bic<best[0]:\n                best=(bic,sse,j,coef)\n        bic,sse,j,coef=best\n        improvement=cur_sse-sse\n        step_info.append((p, producers[j], rank, improvement, coef[-1]))\n        selected.append(j); rem.remove(j); cur_sse=sse\n\nstep_df=pd.DataFrame(step_info, columns=['product','producer','rank','improvement','coef'])\nfor cand in [('P_3','PR_50'),('P_6','PR_54'),('P_9','PR_34'),('P_13','PR_3'),('P_15','PR_59'),('P_22','PR_21'),('P_25','PR_55'),('P_26','PR_24'),('P_30','PR_41')]:\n    p,pr=cand\n    sub=step_df[(step_df.product==p)&(step_df.producer==pr)]\n    print(cand, sub.to_dict('records'))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

b/=b.mean(); c=np.maximum(mat.mean(axis=1),1e-6).copy()\n    for _ in range(25):\n        c=np.quantile(mat / b[None,:], 0.8, axis=1)\n        c=pd.Series(np.maximum(c,1e-6)).rolling(7, center=True, min_periods=1).mean().to_numpy().copy()\n        b=np.quantile(mat / c[:,None], 0.9, axis=0); b=np.maximum(b,1e-6).copy(); scale=b.mean(); b/=scale; c*=scale\n    g=sold_seg[sold_seg['product']==p].groupby(['day','store','producer'])['qty'].sum()\n    producers=sorted(g.index.get_level_values('producer').unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n    q_arr=np.zeros((365,len(stores),len(producers)))\n    store_idx={s:i for i,s in enumerate(stores)}; prod_idx={pr:i for i,pr in enumerate(producers)}\n    for (day,store,producer), qty in g.items():\n        q_arr[int(day)-1, store_idx[store], prod_idx[producer]] = qty / c[int(day)-1]\n    kernel=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\n    X=np.zeros((365,len(stores),len(producers)))\n    for lag,w in enumerate(kernel, start=1):\n        X[lag:] += w*q_arr[:-lag]\n    X2=X.reshape((-1,len(producers)))\n    y=np.maximum(b[None,:] - (mat / c[:,None]),0).reshape(-1)\n    selected=[]; rem=list(range(len(producers))); cur_sse=(y*y).sum(); rank_of_target=None\n    for rank in range(1,11):\n        best=None\n        for j in rem:\n            cols=selected+[j]\n            coef,_=nnls(X2[:,cols],y)\n            pred=X2[:,cols]@coef\n            sse=((y-pred)**2).sum()\n            bic=len(y)*np.log(sse/len(y)+1e-12)+len(cols)*np.log(len(y))\n            if best is None or bic<best[0]:\n                best=(bic,sse,j,coef)\n        bic,sse,j,coef=best\n        improvement=cur_sse-sse\n        pr=producers[j]\n        if pr==target and rank_of_target is None:\n            rank_of_target=(rank, improvement, coef[-1])\n        selected.append(j); rem.remove(j); cur_sse=sse\n    print(p,target,'rank',rank_of_target)\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"P_3 PR_50 rank (6, np.float64(0.05899011334642701), np.float64(0.03804873728006829))\nP_6 PR_54 rank (1, np.float64(14.763085209720384), np.float64(0.4011699089345064))\nP_9 PR_34 rank (4, np.float64(0.22600170713471535), np.float64(0.09449938511010182))\nP_13 PR_3 rank (1, np.float64(17.005720299318234), np.float64(0.3217385704581664))\nP_15 PR_59 rank None\nP_22 PR_21 rank (7, np.float64(0.008756848197987388), np.float64(0.020406863839198486))\nP_25 PR_55 rank None\nP_26 PR_24 rank (8, np.float64(0.006032174011879832), np.float64(0.022808597567883775))\nP_30 PR_41 rank (2, np.float64(1.6242326783009933), np.float64(0.14638126886670116))\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

pre3=rel.loc[day-3:day-1].to_numpy(dtype=float); post14=rel.loc[day+1:day+14].to_numpy(dtype=float)\n    if np.isnan(pre14).any() or np.isnan(pre3).any() or np.isnan(post14).any(): continue\n    if not (0.97 <= pre14.mean() <= 1.03 and pre14.std() < 0.04 and 0.98 <= pre3.mean() <= 1.03):\n        continue\n    post3=post14[:3]\n    score=(1-post3.mean())*2 + (1-post14.mean()) + 0.5*(1-post3.min()) + 0.2*np.sum(np.maximum(1-post14,0))\n    rows.append((p,producer,day,store,qty,post3.mean(),post3.min(),post14.mean(),post14.min(),float(np.sum(np.maximum(1-post14,0))),score))\nres=pd.DataFrame(rows,columns=['\"'product','producer','day','store','qty','post3_mean','post3_min','post14_mean','post14_min','cum_deficit','score'])\nfor p in products:\n    sub=res[res['product']==p].sort_values(['score'], ascending=False)\n    if len(sub):\n        print(p)\n        print(sub.head(3).to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
